metadata.description: Public marketplace for Claude Code plugins and MCP clients from CE Dot Net

plugins.name: ace
plugins.description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.4.4: Fix /ace:ace-insights + per-agent analytics. CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT fallback resolver (works for users whose hook env lacks the var), diagnostic empty-state messaging, per-task agent badges, and 'By Agent' rollup table. Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.15.0.
